Tell us what went wrong in plain English. "The screener returned zero results even though markets were open" is perfect. You don't need to be technical.

## Your setup

- **OS:** (Windows / macOS / Linux)
- **Python version:** (run `python --version` in a terminal)
- **ETradeBot version:** (check the footer of the dashboard, or run `git log --oneline -1`)

- **Running mode:** dry_run / semi / full

## Anything else?

Did it ever work before? Did something change recently (new Python, new E\*Trade key, etc.)? Any detail helps.
